---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the spur Stata package
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed change

What would you like spur to do?

## Why this belongs in spur

Is this about command behavior, numerical methods, parity with R/Matlab, help files/examples, or packaging/installation?

## Alternatives considered

What are you doing today instead?

## Additional context

Examples, command snippets, related issues, or parity expectations versus R/Matlab.
